title: Kerberoasting: RC4 Encrypted Service Ticket Request
description: Detects Kerberos TGS requests using RC4 encryption (0x17) — a strong Kerberoasting indicator. Modern AD uses AES256 (0x12); RC4 requests indicate Rubeus, Invoke-Kerberoast, or GetUserSPNs.py. Excludes machine accounts (ending in $) which legitimately use RC4.
query: 'Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events' and 'Event ID' = '4769' and 'Original Log Content' like '%TicketEncryptionType:0x17%' and not 'Original Log Content' like '%ServiceName:%$%' | eval Account = regexextract('Original Log Content', 'TargetUserName:([^;]+)'), Service = regexextract('Original Log Content', 'ServiceName:([^;]+)'), SrcIP = regexextract('Original Log Content', 'IpAddress:([^;]+)') | stats count as Requests by Account, Service, SrcIP, Entity | sort -Requests
falsepositives: Legacy applications requiring RC4 Kerberos tickets
